zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Langford於1350年出生在英國藍卡爾巴洛 白 曼徹斯特時，她的父親Sir Ralph Langford36歲，母親Lady Langford32歲。她於大約1365年與Sir John Barlow在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1392年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Langford于1350年出生在英国藍卡爾巴洛 白 曼徹斯特时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Langford36岁，母亲Lady Langford32岁。她于大约1365年与Sir John Barlow在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1392年在英国英格兰越可爾享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Langford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

variants.name: Lankford
meanings: English: apparently a variant of   Langford  .

variants.name: Langfitt
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Langford  .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Langford was born in 1350, in Barlow by Manchester, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Ralph Langford, was 36 and her mother, Lady Langford, was 32. She married Sir John Barlow about 1365, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1392, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.Barlow, Chorlton-cum-Hardy, Lancashire,: Barlow by Bury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Langford est née en 1350, à Barlow by Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Langford, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Langford, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Barlow environ 1365, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1392, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.Barlow, Chorlton-cum-Hardy, Lancashire,: Barlow by Bury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Langford 1350 in Barlow by Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Langford 36 und ihre Mutter Lady Langford 32. Sie hat um 1365 in Yorkshire, England Sir John Barlow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1392 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Langford è nata il nel 1350 nel Barlow by Manchester, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Langford, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lady Langford, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Barlow circa 1365, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1392, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Langfordが1350年にイギリスランカシュアイアバーロウ ビー マンチェスターで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Langfordは36歳，母Lady Langfordは32歳であった。約1365年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir John Barlowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1392年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで42歳で死去した。

ko.Barlow, Chorlton-cum-Hardy, Lancashire,: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 발로 비 버이
ko.lifeSummary: Ann Langford(이)가 1350년 영국 랭카실르 발로 비 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Langford(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Langford(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1365년 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir John Barlow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Barlow, Chorlton-cum-Hardy, Lancashire,: Barlow by Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Langford nasceu em 1350, em Barlow by Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Langford, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Langford, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Barlow aproximadamente 1365, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1392, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos.

ru.Barlow, Chorlton-cum-Hardy, Lancashire,: барлоу би бури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Langford родилась в 1350 г. в местности барлоу би манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Langford было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Langford, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Barlow около 1365 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1392 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Langford nació en 1350, en Barlow by Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Langford, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Langford, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir John Barlow aproximadamente 1365, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1392, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años.
